backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining the backend for TerritoryFit, including fitness profile management, workout session recording, territory zone tracking, analytics, and Stripe payment configuration with admin access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (auth, activity tracking, analytics, AI coaching) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the pages and components in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the TerritoryFit React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, a responsive layout with desktop sidebar and mobile bottom nav, authentication state handling, profile setup modal, gamification overlays, and ad banners for free-tier users.
frontend/src/components/analytics/GoalTr: Analytics component that computes today's distance and calorie totals from workout sessions and renders progress bars against configurable daily goals.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Person: Analytics component that derives and displays a user's personal bests (longest distance, best pace, most calories, longest session) from their workout session history.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Progre: Renders a responsive line or bar chart for fitness metrics (distance or calories) using Recharts, with a custom styled tooltip.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state and clearing React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A two-step modal dialog for new users to enter their fitness profile details (name, age, gender, height, weight, goal) and submit via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/coach/HydrationR: Displays a hydration recommendation card with a visual water-fill indicator, calculating recommended daily water intake based on the user's most recent workout session duration.
frontend/src/components/coach/MealPlanCa: Shows a goal-specific daily meal plan card with calculated calorie targets and macro split percentages based on the user's weight, age, and fitness goal.
frontend/src/components/coach/WorkoutRou: Renders a goal-specific workout routine card listing exercises with sets/reps details and coaching instructions from a predefined routine map.
frontend/src/components/game/TerritoryMa: Renders a 2×2 interactive grid of territory zones, color-coded by owner, with visual indicators for contested zones and zones owned by the current user.
Displays a legend listing the top territory owners with their assigned colors and zone counts, derived from the provided zones data.
frontend/src/components/game/ZoneOwnersh: Displays a card showing the owner and top challengers of a named zone, ranked by pass counts fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/components/gamification/Dai: Shows a rotating daily challenge (distance, calories, or workouts) with progress bar and XP reward based on today's workout sessions.
frontend/src/components/gamification/Lev: Renders a level and XP progress bar in either compact or full layout, derived from a total XP value using gamification utilities.
frontend/src/components/gamification/Log: Tracks and displays the user's consecutive login streak using localStorage, showing a flame badge with the streak count.
frontend/src/components/leaderboard/Lead: Renders a ranked leaderboard list with medal icons for top 3, highlighting the current user's entry and appending it below if outside the visible list.
frontend/src/components/overlays/LevelUp: Full-screen animated overlay that appears when a level-up event is triggered, displaying the new level number and star icons.
frontend/src/components/overlays/XPGainO: Floating animated overlay that displays the amount of XP gained when an xpGain overlay event is active.
frontend/src/components/overlays/ZoneCap: Animated banner overlay shown when a zone is captured, displaying the zone name and a color-coded border matching the capturing user's color.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileD: Profile summary dashboard showing the user's avatar, tier badge, login streak, XP level bar, and a stats grid of zones, distance, calories, and workouts.
frontend/src/components/social/ActivityF: Renders a list of recent workout activity cards for multiple users, showing distance, duration, calories, zone, and relative timestamps.
frontend/src/components/social/ShareActi: Button that copies a formatted workout summary text to the clipboard for sharing on social media.
frontend/src/components/store/StoreItemC: Renders a single store item card with icon, name, description, price, and a buy button that initiates a Stripe checkout session via the useCreateCheckoutSession hook.
frontend/src/components/store/StripeConf: Displays a form to configure Stripe payments (secret key and allowed countries) if Stripe is not yet configured, or shows a confirmation message if it is.
frontend/src/components/subscription/AdB: Renders a simple bottom ad banner with a prompt to upgrade to remove ads.
frontend/src/components/subscription/Tie: Displays a styled badge indicating the user's subscription tier (free, premium, pro, or elite) with an appropriate icon and color.
frontend/src/components/subscription/Upg: Shows a locked-feature prompt with a description of the required tier and a button that navigates the user to the subscription page.
frontend/src/components/tracking/Workout: Provides a workout recording UI with a timer, activity type selector, distance input, and zone picker; on stop it records the session, calculates XP/calories, and triggers overlay notifications.
frontend/src/contexts/FeatureFlagsContex: Provides a React context for managing boolean feature flags (AI coach, team battles, IAP store) with persistence to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/OverlayContext.tsx: Provides a React context for triggering timed overlay notifications for XP gain, level-up, and zone capture events.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCheckoutSess: Exposes a React Query mutation that calls the backend actor to create a Stripe checkout session and returns the session URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Fetches the current user's profile name by calling getFitnessProfile on the backend actor, returning it as a simple UserProfile object.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including fitness profiles, workout sessions, analytics, territory zones, and user stats via the canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a black-and-white OKLCH theme, and defines custom utility classes and keyframe animations for the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActivityHistory.tsx: Activity History page that groups and displays the user's past workout sessions by day, week, or month with aggregate distance, calorie, and duration summaries.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page restricted to admin users, providing tabbed views for territory monitoring, feature flags, revenue configuration (Stripe), and user management.
frontend/src/pages/AICoach.tsx: AI Coach page that displays personalized workout routines, meal plans, hydration reminders, and recovery tips, gated behind a Pro/Elite subscription tier and a feature flag.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page that renders distance and calorie progress charts over 7 or 30 days, computes week-over-week trends, and includes personal bests and goal tracking components.
frontend/src/pages/Badges.tsx: Displays earned and locked badges by computing user stats from workout sessions and owned zones, then checking each badge in the catalog against those stats.
frontend/src/pages/Friends.tsx: Friends management page with a search input and empty state UI; search functionality is stubbed pending backend support, and shows the user's Principal ID for sharing.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page showing today's distance/calorie stats, a daily challenge card, a workout recorder, and an activity feed; renders a landing screen for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory page that loads purchased items from localStorage, displays their activation status with a countdown timer, and allows the user to activate unactivated items.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Leaderboard page with tabs for territory, distance, and calories rankings; territory data is derived from on-chain zone ownership, while distance/calorie entries are limited to the current user's own sessions.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Simple error page shown after a failed payment, with buttons to retry by navigating back to the store or returning home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Success page shown after a completed purchase that auto-redirects to the inventory after a 5-second countdown, with manual navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Profile page that renders the ProfileDashboard with the user's subscription tier and displays their Principal ID; shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/SplashScreen.tsx: Full-screen splash screen with a background image, app icon, title, and a spinning loader shown during initial app load.
frontend/src/pages/Store.tsx: Renders the in-app purchase store page with a hardcoded list of six items (boosters, cosmetics, credits), showing an admin Stripe setup panel for admins and gating the entire page behind a feature flag.
frontend/src/pages/Subscription.tsx: Displays subscription tier options (free, premium, pro, elite) with benefits and pricing, allowing users to upgrade or downgrade by storing the selected tier in localStorage as a demo implementation.
frontend/src/pages/Teams.tsx: Provides UI for creating and joining teams via name/invite-code inputs, gated behind a non-free subscription tier and the teamBattlesEnabled feature flag; actual backend operations are stubbed with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/TerritoryMap.tsx: Renders the territory map page showing a grid of zones, a legend, selected zone details, and capture instructions, fetching zone data and the current user's owned zone count via query hooks.
frontend/src/utils/colorAssignment.ts: Deterministically assigns one of ten predefined hex colors to a user principal by hashing its string representation, and provides a helper to map hex values to color names.
frontend/src/utils/gamification.ts: Contains pure utility functions for XP calculation, leveling, calorie estimation, duration/pace formatting, a badge catalog of ten achievements, and badge unlock logic based on user stats.
frontend/src/utils/subscriptionGating.ts: Defines subscription tier levels and feature access requirements, exporting helpers to check whether a given tier unlocks a feature, along with tier benefit descriptions and pricing constants.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH-based color tokens, Space Grotesk/Mono fonts, player territory colors, custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a territory-based fitness tracking multiplayer game with microservices architecture, listing existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements.
